mapper.sql: select id, material_id, sku_code, aux_id1, aux_id2, aux_id3, sku_name, status, is_deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from t_erp_material_sku
mapper.select: where material_id = #{materialId} and is_deleted = 0 order by sku_code asc
select count(1) from t_erp_material_sku where sku_code = #{skuCode} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update t_erp_material_sku set material_id = #{materialId}, sku_code = #{skuCode}, aux_id1 = #{auxId1}, aux_id2 = #{auxId2}, aux_id3 = #{auxId3}, sku_name = #{skuName}, status = #{status}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark}, id = id where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update t_erp_material_sku set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}

update t_erp_material_sku set is_deleted = 1 where id in
#{id}
update t_erp_material_sku set is_deleted = 1 where material_id = #{materialId}
